Hero.title: Beyond Boundaries Aesthetics: Via Fortis
Hero.subtitle: Customize outdoor living with modern garden fences and immersive landscape architecture.

About.title: The Strong Way
About.description: Via Fortis means 'the strong way' — a path built on clarity, quality and thoughtful architectural design. We believe premium quality doesn't have to be unreachable. Good materials, clean design and reliable engineering should be accessible.

WhyChooseUs.title: Straightforward Quality
WhyChooseUs.subtitle: No complications. Just well-made products that look good and feel solid.

items.title: Thoughtful Design
items.desc: Clean lines, consistent finishes. Everything feels intentional.

items.title: Complete Solutions
items.desc: A gate comes with its system. No surprises, no chasing extra parts.

items.title: Reliable Materials
items.desc: Solid, durable, long-lasting. Built to perform in real homes.

items.title: Clear Communication
items.desc: Honest details. No confusing jargon. Straightforward info.

antrasit.title: Titanium Anthracite
antrasit.description: Ultra-matte finish aluminium profiles designed for modern minimalist architecture.

wood.title: Nordic Wood Series
wood.description: The warmth of natural timber texture combined with the durability of aerospace-grade aluminium.

premium.title: Privacy Shield Tech
premium.description: Seamless interlocking panels providing 100% privacy and superior wind resistance.
